prestazioni: ES9J4 3.0L V6 (207hp stock) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) with a custom Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU mapped by Dynojet UK for 380hp on 98 RON fuel, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Milltek Sport 200-cell catalytic converter and a Scorpion 76mm titanium backbox

Fully built ES9J4 internals: forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a ported/polished cylinder head with Ferrea Racing 1mm oversized valves and titanium retainers, all balanced by Cosworth UK

KW Variant 3 coilovers with custom valving for the 406 Coupe’s MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers and AP Racing CP6640-1000 front brake calipers with 355mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (406 Coupe-specific, not a generic kit) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon, finished in Peugeot Sport’s ‘Rouge Lucifer’ paint code (B74) with matte black accents

OEM+ headlight restoration using Hella DE projector lenses with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs, paired with custom LED angel eyes by LUX Automotive, and a full rear light conversion to sequential LED units by VLand with a custom CAN bus decoder for error-free operation

BBS CH-R 18x9.5 ET25 wheels (4x108 PCD) with 245/40/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, wrapped in a custom 3M Gloss Black vinyl roof and mirror caps, with a full interior retrim in Nappa leather by Royal Steering Wheels featuring a Momo Mod.70 steering wheel and custom aluminum pedals by 034 Motorsport
